hero.role: Full Stack Developer · Minas Gerais, Brazil
hero.tagline: I build systems that scale — from backend to browser.

mitsu.description: Live ticketing platform with real events and real revenue in production. High-performance Go backend with Redis queues and Angular frontend.

ai_whatsapp.description: AI agent for store support via WhatsApp. Integrates Claude API for intelligent responses with strict data validation using Zod.

ad_architecture.description: Academic Active Directory architecture project for a fictional company — GPOs, OUs, users, and documented security policies.

portfolio.description: This website — built with Angular 21, Analog.js (SSG/SSR), Tailwind CSS v4, PT/EN i18n, and automatic deployment on Vercel.

about.title: About
about.bio_1: I'm Vinicius Mendes, a Full Stack developer based in Minas Gerais, Brazil. I've been working professionally in software development for 3 years, focused on robust backend systems and modern interfaces.
about.bio_2: I started at Bravo Serviços Logísticos as an intern and grew to analyst, always looking to solve real problems with technology. Along the way, I created Mitsu — a live ticketing platform built with Go, Angular, and Redis, now in production with real users and revenue.
about.bio_3: I have a particular affinity for Go for high-performance backends, TypeScript on the frontend with Angular, and AI APIs for intelligent automation.

2025.description: Full stack development with Node.js, TypeScript, and Angular. Responsible for critical production features and architecture for new solutions.

2024.description: Progressed from intern to assistant. Started technical leadership in small deliveries and participated in architecture decisions.

2023.description: First contact with a professional environment. Oracle, SQL, and internal process stack.

2022.description: Networking, Active Directory, and first projects in Python. Technical foundation that guides my career.
